violations.claim: applyAxioms calls applyP1 without establishing proven[i].smt2 is valid SMT-LIB.
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P1
; LINE: 64
; applyAxioms calls applyP1 without establishing proven[i].smt2 is valid SMT-LIB.
; proven[i].smt2 is loaded from disk JSON — no validation at load site or call site.
(declare-const smt2_is_valid_smtlib Int)   ; 1 = well-formed, 0 = malformed
(declare-const caller_validates_smt2 Int)  ; 1 = applyAxioms checks smt2 before call
; Code transition: ContractStore.loadFromDisk parses JSON but never validates smt2 content
(assert (= caller_validates_smt2 0))
; Code transition: applyAxioms calls applyP1 directly from the contracts array
; no validation step between load and call
(assert (=> (= caller_validates_smt2 0) (= smt2_is_valid_smtlib 0)))
; Violation: applyP1 receives malformed smt2
(assert (= smt2_is_valid_smtlib 0))
(check-sat)
